teams.title: Teams to Scrape
teams.description: List of team names to scrape (in preference order). Leave empty for all UAE teams.

skipPatterns.description: Regex patterns for job titles to skip (case-insensitive)

maxShowMoreClicks.description: Maximum number of times to click 'Show more' per team page

scrapeDetails.title: Scrape Job Descriptions
scrapeDetails.description: Visit each detail_url to extract full job description (requirements, responsibilities, etc.)

scrapeApplyForm.title: Scrape Apply Form Fields
scrapeApplyForm.description: Visit each apply_url to extract application form fields and questions
